title: Add user profiles, post moderation, and location selection

requirements.text: Extend the user profile data model in the backend to include a location field that stores the user's selected location

quotes: I also want users to be able to select a location

acceptanceCriteria: User profile records include a location field
Location data persists across canister upgrades
Users can update their location after initial registration

requirements.text: Add location selection functionality to the user registration and profile editing flows in the frontend

quotes: I also want users to be able to select a location

acceptanceCriteria: Users can select a location during registration
Users can view their current location on their profile
Users can update their location from their profile page
Location selection UI is intuitive and accessible

requirements.text: Add a moderation status field to posts in the backend that tracks whether posts are pending review, approved, or removed

quotes: I want to add user profiles and a way to moderate posts

acceptanceCriteria: Posts have a moderation status that defaults to pending or approved
Moderation status persists across canister upgrades
Backend API supports querying posts by moderation status

requirements.text: Implement backend authorization logic that designates certain users as moderators with permission to approve or remove posts

quotes: I want to add user profiles and a way to moderate posts

acceptanceCriteria: System identifies and stores moderator principals
Only moderators can change post moderation status
Non-moderators attempting moderation actions receive authorization errors

requirements.text: Create a moderation interface in the frontend that allows moderators to review posts and approve or remove them

quotes: I want to add user profiles and a way to moderate posts

acceptanceCriteria: Moderators see a moderation queue or interface accessible from navigation
Each post displays approve and remove action buttons for moderators
Moderation actions trigger backend updates and refresh the UI
Non-moderators do not see moderation controls

requirements.text: Filter the community feed to only display posts that have been approved by moderators

quotes: I want to add user profiles and a way to moderate posts

acceptanceCriteria: The community feed only shows approved posts to regular users
Removed posts do not appear in the feed
Moderators can optionally view all posts regardless of status

requirements.text: Display user location information on user profile pages

quotes: I also want users to be able to select a location

acceptanceCriteria: User profile pages display the user's selected location if available
Location information is styled consistently with the existing profile design

constraints: Maintain single-actor backend architecture in main.mo
Do not modify read-only frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
Preserve existing user authentication via Internet Identity
Maintain chronological post ordering in the community feed
nonGoals: Role-based access control beyond basic moderator designation
Location-based filtering or searching of posts
